fix: use actions/deploy-pages for workflow-based GitHub Pages

Pages is configured with build_type=workflow; mkdocs gh-deploy only pushes
to the gh-pages branch which is ignored in this mode. Switch to the proper
Actions-based pipeline: mkdocs build → upload-pages-artifact → deploy-pages.

- Removed duplicate K-Dense broad skill entry and re-added it with updated details.

docs: Add VMWare Workstation 25H2 docs, chore: restructure content (#41)

## Summary

Global restructuring and additions of content. Solved a few bugs, added
a new section about running VMWare Workstation 25H2 on Linux. Corrected
some typo's, moved content. etc.

## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [x] `fix` — bug fix (broken link, incorrect command, layout issue)
- [x] `content` — update or improve existing content
- [x] `docs` — changes to CONTRIBUTING, README, or meta documentation
- [x] `chore` — maintenance (dependencies, config, CI/CD)

> [PR title and commit types must follow these standards — view the
contributing
guide](https://github.com/Stensel8/Zephyrus-Linux/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages)

## Checklist

- [x] PR title follows the commit convention (e.g. `fix: correct nmcli
command in eduroam guide`)
- [x] Both EN and NL versions updated (if applicable)
- [x] Media is in AVIF format (not PNG/JPG)
- [x] No broken image references (`/images/*.avif` all exist in
`static/images/`)
- [x] Tested locally with `hugo server`

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: swap mssql/server for azure-sql-edge on ARM64 hosts

The Azure Service Bus emulator depends on SQL Server, which has no ARM64
image. On Apple Silicon (and other ARM64 hosts), the mssql/server:2022-latest
container fails under QEMU with jemalloc address mapping errors.

Use Aspire's BeforeStartEvent to intercept the container model and swap the
image to azure-sql-edge:latest, which has native ARM64 support. The Service
Bus emulator works with either SQL engine.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add tests for Exceptions, PendingMode, and PendingModel (#49)

- tests/Unit/Exceptions/ExceptionsTest.php: covers all 4 exception
  classes (JsonRpcException, SessionErrorException,
  SessionTimeoutException, StrayRequestException) with message
  formatting and type assertions
- tests/Unit/Rpc/PendingModeTest.php: covers PendingMode.get() and
  PendingMode.set() with typed and array params
- tests/Unit/Rpc/PendingModelTest.php: covers PendingModel.getCurrent()
  and PendingModel.switchTo() with typed params, array params, and
  ReasoningEffort enum

Round market price series to 2 decimal places in marketing_gen

4 decimal places introduced noise that inflated CV and skewed predictability scores.
Standard financial market prices are quoted to 2 decimals (cents).

Add `dim_names` parameter to `infer_dynamic_shapes` for named dynamic dimensions (#1029)

* Initial plan

* Add dim_names parameter to infer_dynamic_shapes for named dynamic dimensions

Co-authored-by: xadupre <22452781+xadupre@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address code review: improve _get_dim_value docstring and fix trailing blank lines

Co-authored-by: xadupre <22452781+xadupre@users.noreply.github.com>

* Refactor _get_dim_value from nested function to instance method of InputObserverInfo

Co-authored-by: xadupre <22452781+xadupre@users.noreply.github.com>

* Address review: move dim_names logic to _post_process_dim_names, add bool support and _build_auto_dim_names with _KNOWN_DIM_NAMES

Co-authored-by: xadupre <22452781+xadupre@users.noreply.github.com>

* Embed dim_names strings directly in flat_dynamic_shapes using _position_to_args_kwargs and _resolve_dim_label

Co-authored-by: xadupre <22452781+xadupre@users.noreply.github.com>

* _resolve_dim_label always returns a unique string; fallback auto-generates <name>_dim_<n>

Co-authored-by: xadupre <22452781+xadupre@users.noreply.github.com>

* style

* style

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: xadupre <22452781+xadupre@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Xavier Dupré <xadupre@microsoft.com>

Fix memory leaks in TranscriptBuilder, TranscriptTextContent, and MainWindow

TranscriptBuilder: Track all PropertyChanged handlers subscribed on
ChatMessageViewModel in _pendingToolHandlers list. Unsubscribe all pending
handlers in ResetState() (called on every chat switch via Rebuild). Handlers
that complete naturally (tool status → Completed/Failed) also remove
themselves from the tracking list. Fixes 5 handler sites (todo, terminal,
generic tool, subagent, assistant streaming) that previously only
unsubscribed on completion — abandoned/in-progress tools leaked forever.

TranscriptTextContent: Add OnDetachedFromVisualTree to clear StrataMarkdown
content and null the Content property, allowing the child StrataMarkdown to
release its caches.

MainWindow: Track project filter bar PropertyChanged handlers and unsubscribe
all of them at the start of RebuildProjectFilterBar before subscribing new
ones. Add guard (_wiredVm) to prevent double-wiring event handlers if
OnDataContextChanged fires multiple times for the same ViewModel.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix NBA API headers to bypass bot detection in all NBA data gens

- Added required NBA-specific headers: x-nba-stats-origin, x-nba-stats-token, Origin, Sec-Fetch-*
- Changed Referer from stats.nba.com to www.nba.com (required)
- Retry backoff increased: 5s/10s/15s instead of flat 2s
- kaggle_nba_gen.py and nba_stream_sync.py: added missing headers (had none)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add .http files for eShop REST API

Structured by bounded context with auth placeholders:
- catalog.http  — 5 endpoints (brands, types, items, item by id, update price)
- basket.http   — 4 endpoints (get, update, checkout, delete)
- ordering.http — 5 endpoints (list, get by id, create, cancel, ship)
- _variables.http — shared IDs and health check
- http-client.env.json — dev/aspire environment config

Authorization headers are commented out, ready to uncomment when auth is added.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
